claims.text: The Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet has a reference kernel receipt whose deterministic finite-mode nonlinear energy-transfer probe reports MATCH within declared tolerances.
claims.falsification: The run receipt is missing, bounded_skew_symmetry_probe is not MATCH, nonlinear_energy_transfer_abs exceeds tolerance, or max_divergence_abs exceeds tolerance.

claims.text: The Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet explicitly keeps the parent Navier-Stokes Millennium problem UNVERIFIABLE.
claims.falsification: The packet or run receipt claims the parent Navier-Stokes existence and smoothness problem is solved or verified.

claims.text: The packet includes negative boundaries that block promoting a finite-mode skew-symmetry witness into a global regularity theorem, physical-fluid validation, or new law-of-physics claim.
claims.falsification: The packet omits negative boundaries or states that the finite-mode witness proves global regularity, validates physical fluids, or discovers a new law.
